stem: If f(x) = x + 5 and g(x) = 4x, what is the value of 6f(3) - g(3)?
rationale: Choice B is correct. f(3) = 3 + 5 = 8, so 6f(3) = 48. g(3) = 4(3) = 12. Therefore 6f(3) - g(3) = 48 - 12 = 36. Choice A confuses operations. Choice C results from not subtracting g(3). Choice D is 6f(3) without subtracting g(3).
